text.title: Freelance Marketplace Platform Tradeoffs Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: Upwork is only viable platform; skip comparison
direct outreach + referral pipeline outperform any marketplace

branch.when: rate_band >= 30 AND rate_band <= 400 AND positioning_defined == false
rate_band >= 30 AND rate_band <= 400 AND positioning_defined == true

conclusion.verdict: score 6 platforms on 5 axes; pick primary + secondary; document churn triggers

example.trace: rate_band >= 30 AND rate_band <= 400 AND positioning_defined == true → conclusion ref="five-axis-score" verdict="score 6 platforms on 5 axes; pick primary + secondary; document churn triggers"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
